channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: ETH eyes a grind to $2,300—but MACD warns. Can ETH hold the line or snap back? 🚀📉 #ETH #CryptoNews #Bitcoin? https://Blockchain.News/news/20260413-price-prediction-eth-ethereum-eyes-2300-recovery-amid-mixed

item.title: BTC flat at $70,820 as mixed signals dodge a clean breakout—could hit $75K by May, but MACD warns near-term headwinds. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260413-price-prediction-btc-targets-75000-by-may-2026-amid #BTC #Crypto #Trading
